# Stephen McCarthy

Canonical website: https://www.stephenmccarthypa.com

Stephen Thomas McCarthy is a physician assistant based in Allentown, Pennsylvania. The site contains a conservative professional profile, a dated professional record, controlled profile links, authoritative source links, and essays on psychiatric ontology and diagnostic language.

Priority pages:

1. https://www.stephenmccarthypa.com/about
2. https://www.stephenmccarthypa.com/professional-record
3. https://www.stephenmccarthypa.com/writing
4. https://www.stephenmccarthypa.com/writing/audhd-psychiatric-ontology
5. https://www.stephenmccarthypa.com/profiles-and-sources
6. https://www.stephenmccarthypa.com/contact

Claim policy:

Stable identity facts are presented conservatively. Time sensitive professional facts include a review date and authority link. Historical records are linked with accurate scope. The site does not publish unverified awards, testimonials, ratings, patient totals, certification claims, prescribing claims, or availability claims.

Latest article:

AuDHD, Psychiatric Ontology, and the Difference Between Naming and Explaining, published July 19, 2026.
